mapper.sql: config_id, config_key, config_value, config_label, config_group, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark
mapper.select: select from biz_trade_agreement_config where status = '0' order by config_group, config_id
select from biz_trade_agreement_config where config_key = #{configKey} and status = '0' limit 1
mapper.update: update biz_trade_agreement_config set config_value = #{configValue}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where config_key = #{configKey}
mapper.insert: insert into biz_trade_agreement_config (config_key, config_value, config_label, config_group, status, create_by, create_time, remark) values (#{configKey}, #{configValue}, #{configLabel}, #{configGroup}, #{status}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark})
